description:
The Regional Medical Research Institute needs its annual Tier II report updated. Following a recent fire marshal inspection, all bulk flammable solvents (Acetone, Methanol, and Isopropyl Alcohol) were relocated from older outdoor sheds into a newly constructed, climate-controlled 'Central Hazmat Bunker'.

Open EPA Tier2 Submit 2025. Import the baseline facility data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\rmi_baseline.t2s. 

Navigate to the chemical inventory for 'Regional Medical Research Institute'. Update the storage locations for the following chemicals:
- Acetone (CAS 67-64-1): Delete 'Shed A - North', add 'Central Hazmat Bunker'
- Methanol (CAS 67-56-1): Delete BOTH 'Shed A - North' and 'Shed B - South', add 'Central Hazmat Bunker'
- Isopropyl Alcohol (CAS 67-63-0): Delete 'Shed B - South', add 'Central Hazmat Bunker'

For the new 'Central Hazmat Bunker' location on ALL three chemicals, set:
- Storage Type: Steel Drum (Code C)
- Pressure: Ambient pressure
- Temperature: Ambient temperature

Do not modify other chemicals (e.g., Sulfuric Acid). Export the updated submission file to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\rmi_consolidated_2024.t2s.
